pr.title: Record: XSA-all + Depth Recurrence + Hedge Mixer TTT (val_bpb=1.0222, 3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines XSA-all, VRL, gated attention, depth recurrence, and CROWN-Q before using Hedge Mixer TTT to blend neural/ngram experts in score-first eval.
techniques: XSA-all + VRL + gated attention over depth-recurrent layers
CROWN-Q warmdown steering weights toward flat minima for GPTQ-lite int6
Hedge Mixer TTT blending neural/unigram/bigram/trigram/entropy experts
